title: Bryan Hidalgo | Senior Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
Request A Consultation
Mr. Hidalgo was born and raised in the Bronx, New York, and currently resides in Orlando, Florida. Mr. Hidalgo’s parents migrated to the United States from Guatemala. He believes that witnessing the challenges his parents faced in their immigration process helps him understand and relate to his clients.
That commitment extends to his work with organizations such as NYC's Land Initiative, Policies for Single Mothers, and LIFT-The Bronx. There, he worked one on one with low-income community members, advocating for safe and stable housing, informing them of their legal rights, and helping them enroll in public programs that provide tax credits, childcare, and healthcare.

## Knowledge & Experience
- Juris Doctor – Barry University School of Law
- Bachelor's Degree in Political Science, Minor in Public Policy – The City College of New York, Colin Powell School
- Hispanic National Bar Association
- Orange County Bar Association
- Young Lawyers Division
In his free time, Mr. Hidalgo enjoys writing, painting, and playing music. Mr. Hidalgo plays more than five instruments including piano, since the age of 8.
